overall.description: A static elevated view of a narrow cyberpunk urban street at night, bathed in pink neon light from large signage on opposing buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon glow, creating a atmospheric scene reminiscent of games like Stray or Blade Runner-inspired environments. The camera remains stationary throughout, observing the empty street from a high vantage point.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an elevated vantage point overlooking the neon-lit street below

entered.detail: Large illuminated sign with Japanese characters casting pink light across the street
Multi-story apartment building with balconies and external air conditioning units
Tall residential building with multiple windows and architectural details
Rain-slicked street surface reflecting pink and blue neon lights
Illuminated vending machine or signage structure at street level
Warm yellow lighting from ground floor commercial spaces
External AC units mounted on building facade
Small tree or shrub at street level partially illuminated by neon

segments.scene_description: A stationary elevated view captures a narrow cyberpunk street canyon bathed in intense pink neon light from a large sign mounted on the facing building. The wet asphalt street below mirrors the vibrant glow, while residential buildings flank both sides with visible air conditioning units and balconies. The scene remains completely static with no pedestrian or vehicle activity, creating a moody, atmospheric urban tableau.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary elevated perspective of a narrow cyberpunk street canyon that remains immersed in a moody, neon-drenched atmosphere. It begins by capturing the intense pink glow emanating from a large sign on a facing building, which casts a vibrant light across the urban corridor. As the eye settles on the scene, the wet asphalt below mirrors this vivid illumination, contrasting with the dark, utilitarian facades of the flanking residential buildings. The view then lingers on the static details of the architecture, such as the air conditioning units and balconies, before finalizing the impression of a completely deserted and atmospheric urban tableau.
